holdings.infoBox: TSCV is an equity ETF with a total of 60 individual holdings. The top holdings are Ssc Government Mm Gvmxx stock at 3.18%, Avanos Medical at 2.71%, Constellium SE at 2.57%, Cushman & Wakefield at 2.50%, and UMB Financial at 2.49%.

overview.description: The Thrivent Small Cap Value ETF (TSCV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund seeks long-term capital growth by actively managing a portfolio of undervalued US small-cap companies. The fund uses fundamental analysis to select equity securities. TSCV was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by Thrivent.
